summary: Complete testing of 'End of Month + N Days' (FM+N) payment terms feature. All 12 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed: (1) 'Fine mese' checkbox exists with data-testid='pt-fine-mese', (2) '+ Giorni successivi' input (data-testid='pt-extra-days') correctly appears only when 'Fine mese' is checked, (3) Simulation calculation correctly adds extra_days after end-of-month. Example verified: Invoice 15/01/2026 with 30gg FM+10 correctly calculates due date as 10/03/2026.

backend_model.details: extra_days: Optional[int] field added at line 38 in payment_type.py

backend_simulate.details: Lines 174-175 in payment_types.py correctly add timedelta(days=extra_days) after fine_mese calculation

backend_crud.details: extra_days saved and retrieved correctly from MongoDB

frontend_extra_days_visibility.feature: data-testid='pt-extra-days' shows only when Fine mese checked
frontend_extra_days_visibility.details: Input field '+ Giorni successivi' hidden when fine_mese=false, visible when fine_mese=true (lines 554-566 in PaymentTypesPage.js)

frontend_simulation.details: handleSimulate function at lines 291-295 in PaymentTypesPage.js adds extra_days after setMonth(target.getMonth() + 1, 0)

frontend_invoice_calc.details: calcDueDate at lines 162-164 adds pt.extra_days after fine_mese calculation

exact_calculation_test.details: Both backend API and frontend UI calculate the same correct date

edge_cases.details: December->January year rollover and leap year February handled correctly

test_credentials: Created and cleaned up test_extradays_*, test_fm_*, test_ed_edge_*, test_ui_ed_* users/sessions
seed_data_creation: Test payment types with TEST_ prefix created during tests, all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: FM+N (Fine Mese + Extra Days) feature fully functional. Key locations: (1) backend/models/payment_type.py:38 - extra_days field, (2) backend/routes/payment_types.py:174-175 - simulate endpoint adds extra_days, (3) frontend PaymentTypesPage.js:554-566 - conditional UI for extra_days input, (4) frontend PaymentTypesPage.js:291-295 - client-side simulation with extra_days, (5) frontend InvoiceEditorPage.js:162-164 - calcDueDate with extra_days. The feature allows payment terms like '30gg FM+10' where payment is due 10 days after end of month.
